name: General International Bus
recent_news: No public news, press, regulatory filings, or website found for 'General International Bus' at 924 E Main St #106, Alhambra CA 91801. Address is a small suite (likely virtual/shared office). Not listed in CPUC PSC carrier database results returned. Possible micro-broker, dormant entity, or mis-classified listing rather than an active school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Too small and too opaque to qualify as a Summit tuck-in: only ~8 employees, no fleet/website signal, and Alhambra suite address suggests this is not an operating yard. Deprioritize pending phone confirmation.

name: Mid States School Bus
districts_or_customers: ~20 school districts across Eastern Nebraska and South Dakota, including Wayne Community Schools (since 1992), Battle Creek, Winnebago, Plattsmouth, Crete, Conestoga, Columbus, Fairbury
recent_news: Acquired by First Student (FirstGroup/now EQT-owned) on March 18, 2021 — First Student's third school-bus acquisition since the start of 2020. Dean Carroll retained in a leadership role with First Student.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFIED — owned by First Student (a direct competitor of Summit/National Express). Not an independent tuck-in target. Remove from pipeline.

name: Wilbraham School Trans Inc
principals: Chester G. Motyka (President; ~72 yrs old, Palmer/Three Rivers MA)
districts_or_customers: Likely Hampden-Wilbraham Regional School District / local Wilbraham, MA area (small footprint)
recent_news: No recent M&A or news; very small independent operator listed at 2624 Boston Rd, Wilbraham. President Chester Motyka (early 70s) suggests classic succession-driven seller profile. Hampden County market is otherwise served by Durham (Summit), Van Pool, and McCarthy Bus.
fit_notes: Genuine micro tuck-in: aging owner-operator in Summit's existing Western MA footprint (Durham legacy). Tiny fleet but density-adjacent to Summit's Wilbraham yard could justify a relationship call; succession signal is strong.

name: N K Bus Inc
recent_news: No news coverage, website, or contracts found. Listed at 607 Wheelhouse Dr, Stafford TX 77477 (industrial-park unit near Houston/Sugar Land); phone not available. No First Student, Durham, or other strategic-owned overlap identified at this entity. Houston/Fort Bend area has a fragmented small-operator pool.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~9 employees) Indian-American owner-operator in Houston metro. Even if operating, fleet is likely <15 buses and customer set unclear; very low priority for Summit tuck-in unless adjacent to an existing Texas yard.

name: Whitaker Brothers Bus
districts_or_customers: Possibly Hanover County area (Rockville VA is in Hanover County); however Hanover County Public Schools operates its own 268-bus district fleet, so any role would be supplemental/charter only
recent_news: Yelp lists a 'Whitaker Bros Bus' at Rockville (page exists but unreviewed; not to be confused with Whitaker Brothers office-equipment company in Rockville MD). Phone area code 703 is Northern VA, inconsistent with Hanover-County Rockville VA address — suggests listing data quality issue or a relocated/defunct entity. No website, no press, no district contracts confirmed.
fit_notes: Hanover County self-operates student transport, so Whitaker Brothers Bus is likely charter/activity, not a contracted school operator. Low fit for a school-bus tuck-in; only worth a phone screen to verify status.
